ALTUMPT_MICASENSE.summary: ALTUMPT_MICASENSE (Altum-PT) is an operational multispectral instrument operated by MicaSense on UAV. It is associated with a uav platform and has private data availability.

ASTER.summary: ASTER (Advanced Spaceborne Thermal Emission and Reflection Radiometer) is an operational multispectral instrument operated by NASA, METI, Japan Space Systems on Terra. It is associated with a satellite platform and has public data availability.
